---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Commands you ran
android-localise ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What happened instead — include error output if possible.

## Environment

- **android-localisation version:** (run `android-localise --version`)
- **Python version:**
- **OS:**
- **Provider / model:** (e.g. gemini / gemini-2.5-flash)
- **JDK available:** (for `verify` issues — yes/no)

## Additional context

Add any other context, `strings.xml` snippets, or screenshots.
